{{Quote|Well, it is glamorous being a star. But it's also hard work.|Bondo|<ref name="Travelling Jindas">{{Ewoks|The Travelling Jindas}}</ref>}}
'''Bondo''' was the leader of the [[Travelling Jindas]], a nomadic tribe of [[Jinda/Legends|Jindas]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The overweight Jinda wore a red tunic and much jewelry. Bondo was a jovial leader, although he frequently got his tribe lost in the forests of Endor.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Bondo was voiced by [[Don McManus]]. [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] planned a Bondo action figure as part of its [[Star Wars: Ewoks (toy line)|''Star Wars: Ewoks'' toy line]], but the toy never got beyond the prototype stage.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Travelling Jindas}} {{1st}}
*{{Ewoks|The Curse of the Jindas}}
*[[Ewoks (picture book)|''Ewoks'' Spanish picture book]]

[[File:Bondo_and_Latana.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Bondo holds an audience with [[Latara/Legends|Latara]].]]
